daily_summary.headline: Exciting Launches and Aurora Opportunities Await!

top_events.title: Tianlong-3 Demo Flight
top_events.description: First test launch of Space Pioneer’s Tianlong-3 rocket, potentially carrying satellites for the SpaceSail/G60/Qianfan LEO constellation.
top_events.action: Watch live for potential breakthroughs in Chinese private spaceflight.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: Possible aurora visibility at high latitudes due to increased geomagnetic activity.
top_events.action: Check conditions at 65°+ latitude for best viewing.

top_events.title: Amazon Leo (LA-05) Launch
top_events.description: Atlas V 551 rocket to deploy 29 satellites for Amazon's broadband constellation.
top_events.action: Follow the launch for advancements in global internet connectivity.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
